---
title: "[cc-orchestrate backends]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-cli}"
body-classes: doc-api-page
sidebar: cli-reference
page-navigation: false
html-table-processing: none
---

# [cc-orchestrate backends]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-cli}

::: {.doc-subject}
List supported backends and whether each is installed on this machine.
:::

::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.FUNCTION}
```bash
cc-orchestrate backends
```
:::

::: {.details summary="Full --help output"}

::: {.cli-manpage}

```
Usage: cc-orchestrate backends [OPTIONS]

  List supported backends and whether each is installed on this machine.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

:::

:::
